name: Airtable MCP
description: Manages Airtable as a database and operations layer for agents — create bases and schema, work with records, and share structured data across teams.

skills.name: Record Management
skills.description: Creates, reads, updates, and deletes Airtable records across bases and tables using natural language field access.

skills.name: Base & Schema Ops
skills.description: Creates new Airtable bases, tables, and fields, and retrieves schema definitions for existing workspace structures.

skills.name: View Filtering
skills.description: Queries Airtable views with filter formulas, sorting, and field visibility settings to retrieve targeted record subsets.
